L1_headline: + HOLX – Ludwig Hantson acquired 3,190 restricted stock units. | 02/26/26
L2_brief: Director Ludwig Hantson acquired 3,190 restricted stock units of Hologic Inc on 02/26/2026 as part of a director compensation grant. The RSUs vest on the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders and settle in shares of common stock on a one-for-one basis. Following the transaction, Hantson beneficially owns 16,146 shares directly, which includes 3,695 RSUs deferred under the issuer's Deferred Equity Plan.

L3_detailed.post_transaction_holdings: 16,146 shares (direct), including 3,695 RSUs with deferred settlement under the issuer's Deferred Equity Plan
L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a director compensation grant of restricted stock units vesting at the 2027 Annual Meeting, not an open-market purchase. The filing notes 3,695 RSUs within the total holdings have been deferred under the Deferred Equity Plan, indicating a pattern of deferring equity compensation.
risks_flagged: No 10b5-1 plan noted; transaction is a director equity compensation grant, not a discretionary open-market transaction
